item.title: IZMO Ltd is Rated Hold by MarketsMOJO
item.description: IZMO Ltd is rated 'Hold' by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 02 July 2025. However, the analysis and financial metrics discussed below reflect the stock's current position as of 09 March 2026, providing investors with an up-to-date perspective on the company’s performance and outlook. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Bajaj Healthcare Ltd is Rated Strong Sell
item.description: Bajaj Healthcare Ltd is rated Strong Sell by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 19 January 2026. However, the analysis and financial metrics discussed here reflect the stock’s current position as of 09 March 2026, providing investors with the latest insights into the company’s performance and outlook. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Valor Estate Ltd is Rated Sell
item.description: Valor Estate Ltd is rated 'Sell' by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 03 February 2026. However, the analysis and financial metrics discussed here reflect the stock's current position as of 09 March 2026, providing investors with the latest insights into the company’s performance and outlook. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slumps Over 2.8% as Market Sentiment Turns Bearish Amid Broad Sector Declines
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp sell-off on 9 March 2026, with the Sensex plunging 2.82% to close at 76,690.11, marking a loss of 2,228.79 points. Market breadth was overwhelmingly negative as all 38 sectors declined, led by the NIFTY PSU Bank index which fell 5.36%. Despite the broad weakness, select stocks such as Coal India and Praj Industries managed modest gains, offering rare pockets of respite amid widespread selling pressure. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a significant downturn on 9 March 2026, declining by 2.85% in a single session and registering a 4.32% drop over the past five trading days. This sharp correction highlights growing investor caution amid broader market volatility, with sectoral performances and stock breadth painting a nuanced picture of the segment’s current health. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 2.81% today and registering a sharper 4.44% fall over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness has been marked by a stark advance-decline ratio, with only two stocks advancing against 98 declining, underscoring widespread selling pressure across heavyweight constituents. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 3.15% on the day and registering a sharper 4.22% fall over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness has been accompanied by a severely skewed advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the segment. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 2.96% on the day and registering a sharper 4.03% fall over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness highlights the challenges facing smaller companies amid current market conditions, with sectoral trends and market breadth indicators underscoring the pervasive selling pressure. Time: 58 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Plunges Nearly 3% as Market Breadth Collapses; Bankex Leads Sector Declines
item.description: The Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp sell-off on 9 March 2026, with the Sensex tumbling 2.90% to close at 76,629.22, marking a steep decline of 2,289.68 points. The Nifty followed suit, dragged down by widespread sectoral weakness and subdued global sentiment, as investors grappled with persistent headwinds and cautious outlooks. Time: 58 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn, declining by 2.89% today and registering a steeper fall of 4.51% over the past five trading sessions. This broad-based weakness has been marked by a stark imbalance between advancing and declining stocks, with only two stocks gaining ground against 98 in retreat, underscoring a pervasive bearish sentiment among heavyweight constituents. Time: 58 minutes ago
